queries.question: How many consecutive days of unexplained absence triggers a referral to social services?
queries.note: Exact fact in §1.8 — '10 consecutive school days'

queries.question: What must a staff member do when a student discloses they are being abused at home?
queries.note: Procedure in §1.13 Taking Action — disclosure handling steps

queries.question: A student has become withdrawn, started covering their arms, and is frequently late to school. What should staff do?
queries.note: Vocabulary mismatch probe: describes behavioural indicators without using the word 'abuse'. Correct answer requires §1.11.B (indicators of abuse — both symptoms named) AND §1.13 (what to do — report to DSL). Tests whether the index surfaces 'indicators' section from a symptomatic description.
